title: Run self-improvement workflow as atomic memory sync
description: When the self-improvement workflow is triggered, execute bootstrap, pattern extraction, iteration logging, and context/decision updates in a single pass to avoid drift.
trigger_conditions: User explicitly asks to start self-improvement workflow
recommended_action: Run sequence bootstrap -> patterns -> iteration log -> context/decisions and persist each artifact in the same session.
avoid: Partial workflow execution with only some artifacts updated
Skipping iteration logging after context updates

title: Compose a missing meta-skill from existing base skills
description: When a requested high-level skill is missing, combine stable base skills in a fixed order and then generate a reusable composite SKILL.md.
trigger_conditions: User asks to activate a skill that is not installed
Equivalent base skills are available locally
recommended_action: Run the base skills sequentially (bootstrap -> pattern extraction -> iteration log -> context update -> skill generation), then install the generated composite skill.
avoid: Blocking execution while waiting for a dedicated remote skill package
Ad-hoc undocumented workflow without memory updates
